name: HRC_SEM_JOBS
description: This table contains information about the job.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary column of job table.

columns.Name: URI
columns.Comments: This is the uri of the job from an employer.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the requisition ID of the job.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_TITLE
columns.Comments: This column contains the requisition title.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: This column is the Requisition Number ( Can be alphanumeric )

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: This column describes the title of the job.

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the job family name.

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the job function name.

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the job family ID.

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the job function id.

columns.Name: POSTED_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the posted job id.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains organization id

columns.Name: SHORT_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This columns contains the short description.

columns.Name: LONG_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This column contains long description.

columns.Name: SHORT_DESCRIPTION_CLOB
columns.Comments: This column contains the short description clob.

columns.Name: LONG_DESCRIPTION_CLOB
columns.Comments: This column contains the long description clob.

columns.Name: POSTED_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the posted date of the job.

columns.Name: TRAVEL_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This column indicates if this job requires travel.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_DETAILS
columns.Comments: This column describes the internal details of the job.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_DETAILS
columns.Comments: This column describes the external details of the job.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_SNIPPET
columns.Comments: This column describes the internal snippet of the job.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_SNIPPET
columns.Comments: This column describes the external snippet of the job.

columns.Name: FAMILY
columns.Comments: This column describes the family of the job.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the job category ID of the job.

columns.Name: DEPARTMENT
columns.Comments: This is the department where the job belongs to.

columns.Name: DEPARTMENT_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This column describes the description of the job.

columns.Name: LOCATION_GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: This contains the geography id of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_COUNTRY_ID
columns.Comments: This contains the country id of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: This contains the state id of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_CITY_ID
columns.Comments: This contains the city id of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: This contains the postal code of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_LEAF_NAME
columns.Comments: This contains the leaf name of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_FQN
columns.Comments: This contains the fully qualified name of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_LATITUDE
columns.Comments: This contains the latitude of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_LONGITUDE
columns.Comments: This contains the longitude of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ADDRESS_LINE1
columns.Comments: This contains the address line 1 of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ADDRESS_LINE2
columns.Comments: This contains the address line 2 of the location.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column contains the status of the indexing event.

columns.Name: IS_ERROR
columns.Comments: This column indicates if there is an error in the indexing event.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: This column contains the error message of the indexing event.

columns.Name: INDEXING_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the indexing event id.

columns.Name: BATCH_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the batch id.

columns.Name: JOB_SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the Job shift Lookup code

columns.Name: FULL_OR_PART_TIME_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the Full/part time look up code

columns.Name: EDUCATION_LEVEL_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the Education Level code

columns.Name: JOB_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the Job type Lookup code

columns.Name: EXPIRY_DATE
columns.Comments: This column is the Job Expiry Date

columns.Name: MANAGEMENT_LEVEL_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the Management Level Lookup code

columns.Name: RECRUITING_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column is the Recruiting Type Lookup code

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
